prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 该校在西藏招生规模极小，仅1个专业2个名额，招生计划稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华南理工大学为985、211、双一流高校；软科主榜2026年第32名（2021年第27名→2025年第31名→2026年第32名），近年排名略有后移但仍稳居全国顶尖工科院校行列；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及校园偷拍事件（35条相关事件，34条负面），引发社会对校园安全的广泛讨论，可能对报考心理产生一定负面影响；抖音热度排名第87位，评价为一般，综合热度221636，短视频平台曝光度较低；轻工技术与工程A+、化学工程与技术A、材料科学与工程A、环境科学与工程A、食品科学与工程A、建筑学A-、控制科学与工程A-、机械工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共9个A类学科，工科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学类专业2024年热度为分化观望，推荐与劝退并存；西藏自治区2026年高考总人数约41000人（不确定），无法判断考生规模变化趋势；华南理工大学位于广东广州，与西藏自治区距离遥远，跨省报考需考虑地域适应因素；该校在西藏招生占比极小（仅2人），属典型的外省招生名额。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合学校层次（985/211/双一流，软科第32名）、2026年声誉明显负面（偷拍事件可能抑制报考热情）、抖音热度一般、法学专业热度分化观望、西藏考生规模约41000人等因素，在缺乏历年位次基准的情况下，参考同层次985高校在西藏文科的录取位次区间（通常在全藏前300-500名），预测2026年华南理工大学在西藏文科最低录取位次约410名，区间360-460名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The university has a very small enrollment scale in Tibet, with only 1 major and 2 spots, and the enrollment plan is stable.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China University of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 32nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (27th in 2021 → 31st in 2025 → 32nd in 2026), with a slight decline in recent years but still firmly among the top engineering universities in China; the 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving campus voyeurism incidents (35 related incidents, 34 negative), which may have a certain negative impact on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranks 87th, with an average evaluation, comprehensive popularity 221636, and low exposure on short video platforms; Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Food Science and Engineering A, Architecture A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, a total of 9 A-class disciplines, with outstanding engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of law majors in 2024 is polarized and wait-and-see, with both recommendations and dissuasion coexisting; the total number of Gaokao examinees in Tibet Autonomous Region in 2026 is about 41,000 (uncertain), making it impossible to judge the trend of examinee scale changes; South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, far from Tibet Autonomous Region, and cross-province applications need to consider regional adaptation factors; the university's enrollment proportion in Tibet is extremely small (only 2 people), typical of out-of-province enrollment quotas.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the university level (985/211/Double First-Class, 32nd in Soft Science), clearly negative reputation in 2026 (voyeurism incidents may suppress application enthusiasm), average Douyin popularity, polarized wait-and-see for law major popularity, and about 41,000 examinees in Tibet, in the absence of historical ranking benchmarks, referring to the admission ranking range of similar 985 universities in Tibet's liberal arts (usually within the top 300-500 in the entire region), it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for South China University of Technology in Tibet's liberal arts in 2026 will be about 410, with a range of 360-460.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Law Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: South China University of Technology only recruits one major (Law Class) with 2 spots in the liberal arts of Tibet Autonomous Region, making it impossible to divide into multiple tiers. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (360-460) can actively apply; those with rankings better than 360 have a higher chance of admission; those with rankings after 460 need to be cautious. It is recommended to comprehensively consider other 985 universities' law majors.
